hero.name: TAHA EL BAH
hero.tagline: Building APIs that scale. Systems that last.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Full-stack software engineer building production applications with React, Spring Boot, NestJS, Laravel and PostgreSQL. I've shipped web platforms, AI-powered systems and scalable backend APIs — 25+ production REST APIs, endpoints tuned to sub-200ms — and owned them across development, deployment and maintenance.

projects.title: What I've Built
projects.ontarioPostDesc: Full-stack independent news platform for Toronto, the GTA and Ontario — categorised sections (politics, business, sports, culture, opinion), live breaking-news updates, weather and traffic. An n8n automation pipeline auto-ingests articles from external sources, runs AI summarisation and rewriting, and schedules publishing. React frontend backed by a PHP/MySQL API powering content management, search and category routing.
projects.aiResumeScreenerDesc: Four-service NestJS microservices backend with JWT/RBAC auth, Redis caching and AWS S3 (p95 < 200ms). A Python FastAPI matching service uses Sentence Transformers for semantic resume–job ranking. Next.js frontend, with automated AWS EC2 deployment via GitHub Actions CI/CD.
projects.keyinovDesc: Web agency I founded and lead, delivering custom websites and web applications for clients end-to-end — from design and development through deployment and maintenance. Responsive React/Laravel frontends and scalable backend services, with hosting, CI/CD pipelines and ongoing production support.
projects.ecommerceDesc: Full-stack e-commerce platform with a custom admin dashboard for products, orders and users. Integrated the WooCommerce REST API for real-time catalogue, order and inventory sync; scalable backend and schema, deployed on Hostinger with CI/CD.
projects.spx500Desc: Leak-free binary classifier predicting whether an S&P 500 stock closes above its open, using only market-open information across ~600K daily records (~500 tickers, 5-year window). Automated model selection across Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost and SVM via TimeSeriesSplit cross-validation (XGBoost best, F1 ≈ 0.63), with SHAP, LIME and permutation-importance explainability.
